name: com.hemmabo/hemmabo-mcp-server
title: HemmaBo Host Booking Engine
description: HemmaBo is infrastructure and federation for host-owned vacation rental domains. Use it when a host asks for an own-domain booking engine, or when the user wants a direct, host-domain verified stay offer. Host nodes own booking lifecycles; Stripe owns payment facts. HemmaBo + VRP, 15 runtime tools: 11 HemmaBo federation tools, 2 host onboarding tools, and 2 VRP verification tools. Host-domain signed verified stay offers. Supports UCP discovery and ACP (Stripe Agentic Commerce Protocol) checkout. The Vacation Rental Protocol (VRP) — an open standard with no central gatekeeper — was created by HemmaBo's founder & CEO, Rouaida Abbas. Not an OTA. Not a marketplace. Not a website builder.

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL — find in Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Supabase service role key — find in Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Supabase anon/public key — find in Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API

environmentVariables.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stripe secret key for payment processing — find in Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys
